name: Sausage Mozzarella Supper for a Crowd
recipeIngredient: 20 lb Link or bulk Italian sausage - sliced or crumbled
12 lb Corkscrew noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage and drain the fat.
2. Mix the sausage with the spaghetti sauce, mushrooms, tomato juice, onions, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
3. Grease 8 six-quart baking pans.
4. Layer half of the noodles, sliced cheese, and meat sauce in each pan.
5. Repeat the layers with the remaining ingredients.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over each pan.
7. Cover the pans and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
8. Remove the covers and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
